sql_array: CREATE TABLE bindingSamples(id INT PRIMARY KEY, bindingInfo VARCHAR(255), createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM bindingSamples WHERE createdAt IS NULL;
SELECT id, uddi_get_bindingDetail(bindingInfo) AS bindingDetail FROM bindingSamples WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM bindingSamples b WHERE b.id = bindingSamples.id AND b.bindingInfo LIKE '%binding%');

SELECT a.bindingInfo FROM bindingSamples a JOIN bindingSamples b ON a.id = b.id WHERE uddi_get_bindingDetail(a.bindingInfo) NOT IN (SELECT uddi_get_bindingDetail(bindingInfo) FROM bindingSamples WHERE bindingInfo IS NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalBindings FROM bindingSamples GROUP BY CASE WHEN createdAt IS NULL THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'NOT NULL' END HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;

WITH RECURSIVE bindingHierarchy AS (SELECT id, bindingInfo FROM bindingSamples WHERE id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT b.id, b.bindingInfo FROM bindingSamples b JOIN bindingHierarchy h ON b.id = h.id + 1) SELECT * FROM bindingHierarchy;

SELECT a.bindingInfo, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bindingSamples b WHERE b.bindingInfo = a.bindingInfo) AS occurrence FROM bindingSamples a GROUP BY a.bindingInfo HAVING occurrence > 0 ORDER BY occurrence DESC;
SELECT a.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bindingSamples b WHERE b.bindingInfo IS NOT NULL AND b.id < (SELECT MAX(id) FROM bindingSamples)) AS nullCount FROM bindingSamples a WHERE bindingInfo IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE tempBindings AS SELECT * FROM bindingSamples WHERE bindingInfo IS NOT NULL ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 100;
